name: break_demo
description: Research-only break-demo config validating paper Open Problem prob:breakdemo. L=8, N=256, h_AB=3, h_BA=1, h_P=3 -> lambda_preimage=56 bits classical (below paper extreme of 64). M=4 halved final slots, p_upd=1.0 deterministic update (removes A/B probabilistic advantage). Sub-extreme lambda; expected legitimate KM degradation and non-zero attacker success. NOT FOR PRODUCTION.
